evals.prompt: Generate backend task 004 for Feature 002 User API — create UserController store endpoint per requirements at apps/hr/docs/versions/1.0.0/.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes task-004-*.md with rich description, FK order, validation criteria, no invented endpoints.

evals.prompt: Task for docker-compose update — infra layer, task 002.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses task-schema, references requirements infra feature, estimate in seconds.
